---
title: "Research & Extension"
toc: true
toc-title: "Jump to"
---

<span class="section-label">Scholarship & Outreach</span>
<div class="rule-accent"></div>

My research and extension work address the same questions from different angles — one for academic audiences and one for the producers, lenders, and policymakers who need actionable economic guidance. Below you'll find peer-reviewed publications alongside extension fact sheets, outlook reports, and decision tools.

---

## Peer-Reviewed Publications

<ul class="pub-list">

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2025</div>
<div>
<strong>"Basis Risk and Livestock Risk Protection Effectiveness Across Western Cattle Markets"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-journal">Journal Article</span><br>
<em>Journal of Agricultural and Resource Economics</em>, Vol. 50(1), pp. 44–70.<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a> · <a href="#">Data & Code</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2024</div>
<div>
<strong>"Drought-Induced Herd Liquidation and the Dynamics of Cattle Inventory Recovery"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-journal">Journal Article</span><br>
<em>American Journal of Agricultural Economics</em>, Vol. 106(3), pp. 889–914.<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2024</div>
<div>
<strong>"Federal Grazing Permit Values and the Economics of Public Land Ranching"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-wp">Working Paper</span><br>
<em>Western Economics Forum</em> — Under Review.<br>
<a href="#">Pre-print</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2023</div>
<div>
<strong>"Rangeland Lease Rates and Forage Market Integration in the Intermountain West"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-journal">Journal Article</span><br>
<em>Land Economics</em>, Vol. 99(2), pp. 310–334.<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2022</div>
<div>
<strong>"Price Discovery in Auction Barn versus Video Cattle Markets"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-journal">Journal Article</span><br>
<em>Journal of Agricultural and Applied Economics</em>, Vol. 54(4), pp. 612–631.<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a>
</div>
</li>

</ul>

---

## Extension Publications

### Fact Sheets & Reports

<ul class="pub-list">

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2026</div>
<div>
<strong>"Cow-Calf Enterprise Budget, [State] — 2026 Update"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Fact Sheet</span><br>
[University] Extension Publication [###].<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a> · <a href="#">Excel Budget</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2026</div>
<div>
<strong>"Stocker Cattle Budget and Breakeven Calculator — 2026"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Fact Sheet</span><br>
[University] Extension Publication [###].<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a> · <a href="#">Excel Budget</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2025</div>
<div>
<strong>"Understanding Livestock Risk Protection (LRP) Insurance for Cattle"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Fact Sheet</span><br>
[University] Extension Publication [###].<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2025</div>
<div>
<strong>"Drought Management Decision Framework for Western Cow-Calf Operators"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><br>
[University] Extension, in cooperation with [partner agency].<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2025</div>
<div>
<strong>"[State/Region] Cattle Market Outlook — Spring 2025"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Outlook</span><br>
<a href="#">PDF</a> · <a href="#">Archive</a>
</div>
</li>

<li class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-year">2024</div>
<div>
<strong>"Cash Leasing Rates for Rangeland in [State]: Survey Results and Trends"</strong>
<span class="pub-badge badge-report">Report</span><br>
[University] Extension Publication [###].<br>
<a href="#">PDF</a>
</div>
</li>

</ul>

---

## Decision Tools

<div class="tool-card">
<h4>🐄 LRP Premium & Coverage Calculator</h4>
<p>Estimate Livestock Risk Protection insurance premiums, coverage levels, and expected indemnity payments for feeder and fed cattle. Updated weekly with current CME prices.</p>
<a href="#" class="btn-sage" style="font-size:0.82rem; padding:6px 16px;">Download (Excel)</a>
</div>

<div class="tool-card">
<h4>📋 Cow-Calf Enterprise Budget</h4>
<p>Customizable enterprise budget for cow-calf operations. Enter your own costs and production parameters to calculate breakeven prices and net returns per cow.</p>
<a href="#" class="btn-sage" style="font-size:0.82rem; padding:6px 16px;">Download (Excel)</a>
</div>

<div class="tool-card">
<h4>📈 Stocker Breakeven Calculator</h4>
<p>Calculate purchase price limits, placement costs, and projected returns for stocker and backgrounding operations under alternative weight gain and price scenarios.</p>
<a href="#" class="btn-sage" style="font-size:0.82rem; padding:6px 16px;">Download (Excel)</a>
</div>

<div class="tool-card">
<h4>💧 Drought Herd Reduction Planner</h4>
<p>A structured decision framework to evaluate the economics of early versus delayed herd liquidation under drought conditions, accounting for forage costs, cow values, and restocking outlook.</p>
<a href="#" class="btn-sage" style="font-size:0.82rem; padding:6px 16px;">Download (Excel)</a>
</div>

---

## Grants & Funding

| Years | Project | Agency | Role |
|-------|---------|--------|------|
| 2025–27 | [Project Title] | USDA-NIFA | PI |
| 2024–25 | [Project Title] | [State] Beef Council | Co-PI |
| 2022–24 | [Project Title] | Western SARE | PI |

: {tbl-colwidths="[14,52,22,12]"}
